name: Impossible Cheddar and Broccoli Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
Thaw and drain the broccoli. Heat oven to 375°F.
Grease a 9x9x2-inch pan. Mix broccoli, corn, onion, and walnuts in a bowl. Place mixture in pan.
Beat remaining ingredients except cheese until smooth (about 15 seconds in blender on high, stopping frequently to scrape sides, or mix with an electric mixer for about 1 minute).
Pour batter evenly over the mixture in the pan. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 23-25 minutes; sprinkle with cheese.
Continue baking until cheese is melted, about 2-3 more minutes. Let cool for 30 minutes before cutting into triangles or squares. Makes 30 appetizers.
